prerequisites.value: Weapon Focus with piercing weapon, base attack bonus +6.

description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, make a single attack with your chosen weapon. If the attack hits, the targetâs movement speed is halved until the start of your next turn. When your base attack bonus reaches +11, the targetâs movement is so hampered that even a 5-foot step provokes an attack of opportunity. When your base attack bonus reaches +16, the target must also succeed at a Reflex save with a DC equal to 10 + your base attack bonus or become entangled. An entangled creatureâs movement can be halved only once. You can use this featâs benefits only once per minute.
